allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=backend python3 -c "from detector.rule_based.wcag_rules import *; from detector.rule_based.rule_registry import registry; rules = registry.get_rules\('AAA'\); print\(f'Total rules registered: {len\(rules\)}'\); print\('Rule IDs:'\); [print\(f'  - {r.rule_id} \({r.wcag_level}\)'\) for r in rules]")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=backend python3 -c "from detector.rule_based.wcag_rules import *; from detector.rule_based.rule_registry import registry; rules = registry.get_rules\('AAA'\); print\(f'Total rules: {len\(rules\)}'\); assert not any\(r.rule_id == 'focus-visible' for r in rules\), 'focus-visible still present!'; print\('focus-visible rule removed successfully'\)")
